project.name: SpAIglass
project.summary: Browser-based multi-VM Claude Code interface with fleet relay

platform.llm: Claude Code CLI via Agent SDK

components.name: SGCleanRelay
components.description: Stateless routing proxy — WebSocket tunnels, GitHub OAuth, fleet dashboard, static frontend serving, setup docs, project registration docs

components.name: Hono Backend
components.description: Per-VM API server — spawns Claude CLI, file ops, secrets, session state, project/role registration, auto-discovers ~/projects at startup

components.name: Connector
components.description: Persistent WebSocket link from VM to relay — registers the VM, tunnels HTTP/WS traffic

components.name: React Frontend
components.description: Terminal-themed chat UI, file browser, editor, arch viewer, secrets panel, fleet agent switcher. PWA installable.

components.name: Claude CLI
components.description: Anthropic Claude Code CLI — spawned per chat session via Agent SDK

components.name: Terminal Renderer
components.description: Markdown rendering with GFM tables, syntax highlighting, intent-fenced widgets, ANSI color, mermaid diagrams

components.name: Secrets Panel
components.description: CRUD panel for named secrets stored per-VM in ~/.spaiglass/secrets.json

components.name: Architecture Viewer
components.description: Colored collapsible renderer for architecture.json operational manifest

components.name: Fleet Agent Switcher
components.description: Header dropdown listing all fleet agents as project/role with path — switch between VMs without returning to dashboard

connections.purpose: Dashboard, OAuth, frontend assets, setup docs
Forward tunneled requests to local API

infrastructure.name: DigitalOcean Droplet (spaiglass.xyz)
infrastructure.description: Public-facing relay, Caddy TLS termination, serves frontend bundle

infrastructure.name: Agent VMs (19 total, Tailscale mesh)
infrastructure.description: Each runs one spaiglass backend + connector + Claude CLI

datastores.name: Relay SQLite
datastores.description: Users, connectors, sessions, agent keys, role assignments

datastores.name: Session State
datastores.description: Last session ID + project path for session resume

datastores.name: Claude Projects
datastores.description: Claude Code project registry — auto-discovered by backend at startup via registerProjects()

frontends.name: PWA (Chrome/Edge)
frontends.description: Installable standalone app, no browser chrome

frontends.name: Mobile Web (Safari/Chrome)
frontends.description: Bottom tab bar, touch-optimized, safe-area insets for notch

frontends.name: Desktop Web
frontends.description: Split-pane layout with sidebar, editor, arch viewer

siteMap.label: Landing / Fleet Dashboard
siteMap.description: Fleet dashboard with VM list, online status, role selector, add-VM modal. Doubles as landing page with login.

siteMap.label: VM Chat
siteMap.description: React SPA — chat, files, editor, arch, secrets, history, agent switcher

children.label: Fleet Relay API
children.description: Fleet agent list for agent switcher

children.label: Self Relay API
children.description: Current VM connector info + display name

users.description: Full access — all VMs, all operations, fleet management
Chat + file write on assigned VMs

features.name: Terminal-themed chat
features.description: Monospace renderer with colored prompts, tool cards, streaming

features.name: Full markdown rendering
features.description: GFM tables, syntax highlighting, task lists, mermaid, diff blocks

features.name: Intent-fenced widgets
features.description: secret-input, confirm, choice, mermaid, diff — intercepted from fenced code blocks

features.name: Secrets vault
features.description: Per-VM encrypted-at-rest named secrets with masked UI

features.name: PWA installable
features.description: Standalone app mode, no browser chrome, offline shell caching

features.name: File browser + editor
features.description: Tree view, Monaco editor, context file management

features.name: Fleet dashboard
features.description: VM list, online status, role management, add-VM installer

features.name: GitHub OAuth
features.description: Login via GitHub, role-based access per connector

features.name: Themes
features.description: Dark, light, glass, plain, 70s-dark (5 phosphor colors), 70s-light

features.name: Architecture viewer
features.description: Colored collapsible operational manifest from architecture.json

features.name: ANSI color in bash output
features.description: Preserves terminal colors and collapses CR progress bars

features.name: Fleet agent switcher
features.description: Header dropdown to switch between fleet VMs/roles without returning to dashboard. Shows project/role + path.

features.name: One-shot project registration
features.description: POST /api/projects/register creates project dir, role file, and Claude config in one call. Backend auto-discovers projects at startup.

features.name: Frame deduplication
features.description: Skips replayed frames on WebSocket reconnect resume — prevents duplicate chat rows from seq-based replay

features.name: Transient offline suppression
features.description: 12-second grace period before surfacing VM offline errors — absorbs connector flapping without spamming error messages

features.name: Custom tab title
features.description: Settings panel to set custom display name for browser tab; relay renders compact server title by default

externalSystems.name: Anthropic Claude Code
externalSystems.purpose: LLM engine — all AI via Claude CLI subprocess

externalSystems.name: Tailscale
externalSystems.purpose: Mesh VPN connecting all VMs and user devices

deployments.name: Frontend deploy
deployments.description: Build frontend, upload to /opt/sgcleanrelay/frontend/, restart relay

deployments.name: Relay deploy
deployments.description: Push relay source + frontend, restart sgcleanrelay service

deployments.name: Fleet rollout
deployments.description: pack.sh builds tarball, uploads to relay, script fetches + installs on each VM

architectureRules: One spaiglass instance per VM — no multi-tenant
Frontend served from relay only — VMs serve API only
All VM traffic tunneled through relay via HTTP-over-WebSocket
Secrets never leave the VM unmasked — relay only sees encrypted tunnel bytes
Claude CLI is the only LLM integration — no provider switching
File API restricted to project directory — path traversal blocked
GitHub OAuth required for relay — VMs trust the relay's session token
No Anthropic API key auth — subscription billing only, always use claude login OAuth
Project registration must be trivially easy — single API call creates everything needed
Architecture.json is the single operational manifest — agents must keep it current after architectural changes
